name: voiceguide
description: VoiceGuide - AI voice guide that helps users learn unfamiliar programs and web services step by step

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@voiceguide/core && npm run build --workspace=@voiceguide/server && npm run build --workspace=@voiceguide/web && npm run build --workspace=@voiceguide/extension && npm run build --workspace=@voiceguide/guide-extension
